chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI I. T. R. A. No. 15 to 18 / 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE 1) For orders on CMA No. 161/2024. 2) For orders on office objection No. 01 & 25. 3) For orders on CMA No. 162/2024. 4) For orders on CMA No. 163/2024. 5) For hearing of main case. 04.10.2024. Mr. Muhammad Aleem, Advocate for Applicant. ________________ Counsel for Applicant submits that the purpose of filing of these Reference Applications has been served as some order has been passed by the Tribunal in rectification application. Accordingly, all these Reference Applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office shall place copy of this order in connected files. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
